data.title: Safe Superintelligence Secures $2 Billion in Latest Funding Round
data.description: According to PANews, Safe Superintelligence (SSI), an AI startup founded by OpenAI co-founder Ilya Sutskever, has raised $2 billion in its latest funding round, valuing the company at $32 billion. Despite not having released any products yet, the funding round was led by Greenoaks with a $500 million investment, and included participation from Lightspeed Venture and a16z. SSI is focused on developing systems that surpass current AI models, aiming for breakthroughs in superhuman intelligence. The company was established in June 2024 and is headquartered in Palo Alto, California, and Tel Aviv, Israel.

data.title: Aave's Q1 2025 Loan Activity and Revenue Insights
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Token Terminal reveals that Aave's average active loan size reached $12.87 billion in the first quarter of 2025. During the same period, borrowers paid a total of $183.62 million in interest fees. Approximately 15% of these fees generated $27.64 million in revenue for the DAO in the first quarter of 2025.

data.title: Source: Payment giant Visa will join the stablecoin alliance USDG led by Paxos
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to two people familiar with the matter, payment giant Visa will join the stablecoin alliance USDG led by Paxos, along with cryptocurrency and fintech giants such as Robinhood, Kraken and Galaxy Digital. Visa is the first traditional financial institution to join USDG, and the first members of USDG also include Anchorage Digital, Bullish (owner of CoinDesk) and Nuvei. Visa has not yet responded to a request for comment, and a representative from Paxos said the company could not comment on potential partners. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Kraken Launches Stock and ETF Trading in the U.S., Expanding Beyond Cryptocurrency
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The cryptocurrency exchange announced that it will launch commission-free trading services for more than 11,000 US-listed stocks and ETFs for the first time to customers in New Jersey, Connecticut, Wyoming, Oklahoma, Idaho, Iowa, Rhode Island, Kentucky, Alabama and the District of Columbia. After that, the service will be gradually promoted across the United States in stages to cover all eligible US customers. (Businesswire)

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Resistance as Traders Anticipate Further Decline
data.description: According to Odaily, Greek.live macro researcher Adam has released a report in the English community highlighting a bearish sentiment towards Bitcoin. Key traders identify the $82,000 to $84,000 range as a resistance level and expect further declines. There is a notable division regarding altcoins, with some traders seeing opportunities to short overvalued tokens, while others remain cautious about the timing of these trades due to potential market manipulation.

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based KERNEL perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1 to 75 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched the U-based KERNEL perpetual contract with a leverage range of 1-75 times. Contract trading BOT will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: Bybit launches KERNELUSDT perpetual contract with up to 75x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Bybit has launched the KERNELUSDT perpetual contract with a maximum leverage of 75 times.

data.title: Nasdaq 100 futures extend gains to 2%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, the Nasdaq 100 index futures rose by 2%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 85,000 USDT with a 0.80% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 14, 2025, 12:28 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 85,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 85,019.726563 USDT, with a narrowed 0.80% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Highlights the Importance of Values in Ethereum dApps
data.description:
TL;DR Vitalik Buterin calls on Ethereum dApp developers to embed strong social values—privacy, neutrality, and openness—into their platforms, emphasizing that the ethos behind apps is as crucial as their technical functionality. He highlights that around 80% of the Ethereum application layer should serve a purposeful role, illustrating that successful projects like privacy wallets and decentralized. .
source: https://crypto-economy.com/vitalik-buterin-highlights-the-importance-of-values-in-ethereum-dapps/
